content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Throwing and Catching
content.concept: Learning how to throw and catch objects effectively.
content.explanation: In this lesson, we will learn how to throw and catch using our hands. Throwing involves using our arms and body to send an object away, while catching means using our hands to grab it. Let's practice these skills together! рЯОЊрЯ§Ч
examples: Throwing a ball to a friend

practice_questions.q: What do you use to throw a ball?
practice_questions.a: You use your hands and arms.

practice_questions.q: How do you catch a ball?
practice_questions.a: You use your hands to grab it.

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: How to Throw
content.concept: Steps to throw an object correctly.
content.explanation: To throw, stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Hold the ball with both hands and bend your elbows. Twist your body slightly and then push your hands forward to throw the ball! Remember to follow through with your arm. рЯПГвАНвЩВпЄПрЯТ®

practice_questions.q: What should you do with your feet when throwing?
practice_questions.a: Stand shoulder-width apart.

practice_questions.q: What does 'follow through' mean?
practice_questions.a: It means to continue your arm movement after releasing the ball.

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: How to Catch
content.concept: Steps to catch an object effectively.
content.explanation: To catch, stand with your feet apart and bend your knees slightly. Keep your eyes on the ball and use both hands to grab it when it comes close. Remember to pull the ball towards your body to secure it! рЯ§≤вЪљ

practice_questions.q: What should you do with your knees when catching?
practice_questions.a: Bend them slightly.

practice_questions.q: How do you secure the ball when you catch it?
practice_questions.a: Pull it towards your body.

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Throwing and Catching Drills
content.concept: Exercises to improve throwing and catching skills.
content.explanation: Let's practice throwing and catching with some fun drills! You can work with a partner or practice alone. Use a soft ball to make it safe and enjoyable! рЯОЙ
examples: Throw the ball back and forth with a friend
Try to catch the ball while jumping

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Throwing with One Hand
content.concept: Practicing throwing with one hand.
content.explanation: Let's practice throwing a ball using just one hand! рЯОЊ You can raise your arm and throw the ball high up in the air.
examples: Throwing a ball with your right hand
Throwing a ball with your left hand

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Passing the Ball to a Partner
content.concept: Practicing passing the ball to a partner.
content.explanation: Now, let's practice passing the ball to our friends! рЯ§Э You can take a step back and throw the ball to them.
examples: Passing the ball to a friend

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Catching the Ball
content.concept: Practicing catching the ball thrown by a partner.
content.explanation: Let's practice catching the ball! рЯСР When your friend throws the ball, keep your eyes on it and catch it with both hands.
examples: Catching a ball thrown from a distance

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Team Ball Game
content.concept: Playing a team game with balls.
content.explanation: Let's play a fun team game! рЯОЙ Divide into two teams and try to throw the balls into the designated area.
examples: Throwing balls into a marked area

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Throwing for Distance
content.concept: Practicing throwing for distance.
content.explanation: Let's see how far we can throw the ball! рЯМН Stand behind the line and try to throw the ball as far as you can.
examples: Throwing a ball to see who can throw it the farthest
Measuring the distance of each throw

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Catching and Throwing Exercises
content.concept: Exercises to improve catching and throwing skills.
content.explanation: Let's do some fun exercises to improve our catching and throwing! рЯТ™ You can practice throwing with both hands and catching the ball.
examples: Throwing the ball with the left hand
Catching the ball with both hands

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Team Coordination Exercises
content.concept: Exercises to improve team coordination.
content.explanation: Let's work together as a team! рЯ§Ч You can practice passing the ball to each other while moving around.
examples: Working together to complete a task

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Catching the Ball
content.concept: Learn how to catch a ball effectively.
content.explanation: In this game, two teams stand in front of a wall. Each player throws a ball against the wall and tries to catch it when it bounces back. The team that catches the ball the most times wins! рЯОЙ
examples: Team A caught the ball 5 times!
Team B caught the ball 3 times.

practice_questions.q: What do you do when the ball bounces back?
practice_questions.a: You try to catch it!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Kicking and Receiving the Ball
content.concept: Understanding how to kick and receive a football.
content.explanation: In football, we kick the ball to our teammates and receive it back. Kicking is important for passing the ball, and receiving helps us keep the game going! вЪљпЄП
examples: Kicking the ball to a friend.

practice_questions.q: What is the first step in kicking the ball?
practice_questions.a: Stand behind the ball and focus on it.

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: How to Kick the Ball
content.concept: Steps to kick a football correctly.
content.explanation: To kick the ball, stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Lean forward, and use your kicking foot to strike the ball while keeping your other foot steady. Follow through with your kick! вЪљпЄП
examples: Kick the ball with your right foot.
Follow through with your left foot.

practice_questions.q: What should you do with your non-kicking foot?
practice_questions.a: Keep it steady next to the ball.

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: How to Receive the Ball
content.concept: Steps to receive a football effectively.
content.explanation: When receiving the ball, bend your knees and position your body towards the ball. Use your foot to stop the ball and keep it close to you. This helps you control the game! вЪљпЄП
examples: Receiving the ball with your right foot.
Stopping the ball with your left foot.

practice_questions.q: What should you do with your knees when receiving the ball?
practice_questions.a: Bend them slightly.

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: How to Pass the Ball
content.concept: Learn how to pass the ball between feet.
content.explanation: To pass the ball, place it between your feet and use one foot to push it to the other foot. Keep your body balanced and aim for your teammate! вЪљпЄП
examples: Pass the ball from your left foot to your right foot.

practice_questions.q: What do you need to keep balanced while passing?
practice_questions.a: Your body!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Walking and Running
content.concept: Learning to walk and run in different directions.
content.explanation: Let's walk, jog, and run! We can move from left to right and explore how our bodies can move in different ways. рЯПГвАНвЩВпЄПвЮ°пЄПвђЕпЄП

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Playing with a Soft Ball
content.concept: Practicing throwing and catching a soft ball.
content.explanation: Grab a soft ball and find a partner! One of you will throw the ball while the other catches it. Let's see how well we can pass the ball to each other! рЯОЊрЯ§Э
examples: Throwing the ball to a friend

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Tossing the Ball
content.concept: Learning to toss a ball towards a target.
content.explanation: Let's toss the ball! Aim for a target and try to get the ball in. You can bounce it twice before catching it. рЯОѓрЯПР
examples: Tossing the ball into a box

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Jumping into a Box
content.concept: Practicing jumping to land a ball in a box.
content.explanation: Let's jump! Stand a little away from the box and try to jump the ball into it. The team that gets the most balls in wins! рЯПЖрЯУ¶
examples: Jumping to throw the ball into a box

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Playing in a Circle
content.concept: Understanding teamwork through passing a ball.
content.explanation: Let's form a circle and pass the ball around! One person stands in the middle and tries to catch the ball. If they catch it, they switch places! рЯ§ЧвЪљ
examples: Passing the ball in a circle

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Catching and Passing the Ball
content.concept: Practicing catching and passing the ball effectively.
content.explanation: Catch the ball with your hands and pass it to your teammate! Let's see how many times we can pass it without dropping! рЯ§≤рЯПљрЯПИ

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Sit-ups and Stand-ups
content.concept: Practicing sit-ups and standing up with a ball.
content.explanation: Let's do some sit-ups! When you sit up, try to catch the ball with your forehead or chest. This makes it more fun! рЯТ™рЯПљвЪљ

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Balancing a Stick
content.concept: Learning to balance a stick on the palm.
content.explanation: Let's try to balance a stick on your palm! рЯ™Д First, find a nice place to play. Take a stick and place it on your palm. Try to keep it standing straight! Record how long you can balance it. Can you beat your own record? рЯОЙ
examples: Balancing a pencil on your finger
Keeping a book on your head

practice_questions.q: How long can you balance the stick?
practice_questions.a: Try to beat your previous time!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Keep Moving
content.concept: Working together in teams to reach a goal.
content.explanation: Let's play a fun game! рЯ§Э Draw a starting line and a finish line. Form groups of four. Hold hands with your teammates and try to touch the finish line together! The first team to reach wins! рЯПЖ

practice_questions.q: What strategies helped your team win?
practice_questions.a: Teamwork and communication!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Synchronized Movement
content.concept: Moving in sync with music.
content.explanation: Let's have some fun with music! рЯОґ Set up four areas and assign an exercise to each. When the music plays, move around to each area. When the music stops, freeze and do the exercise for 10 seconds! Can you keep up? вП∞

practice_questions.q: Which exercise was your favorite?
practice_questions.a: I loved doing jumping jacks!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Plank Position
content.concept: Holding a plank position to strengthen muscles.
content.explanation: Let's get strong! рЯТ™ Lie on your tummy and lift your body up using your elbows and toes. Keep your body straight like a plank! Try to hold it as long as you can. Can you feel your muscles working? рЯПЛпЄПвАНвЩВпЄП

practice_questions.q: How long can you hold the plank?
practice_questions.a: Try to increase your time each day!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Hula Hoop Game
content.concept: Playing a game with hula hoops.
content.explanation: Let's have some hoop fun! рЯОЙ Place hula hoops in a big circle. When the whistle blows, run around the circle. When the second whistle blows, jump into a hoop! If you don't make it, you're out! Keep playing until one person is left! рЯ•З

practice_questions.q: What was the most fun part of the game?
practice_questions.a: Running and jumping into the hoops!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Chor-Pakda Game
content.concept: Learning to avoid being caught while playing.
content.explanation: In this game, one player is the 'thief' and the others are 'guards'. The guards must watch the thief and try to catch them while the thief tries to reach the center object. If the guards turn around, the thief can move closer! рЯХµпЄПвАНвЩВпЄПрЯПГвАНвЩВпЄП
examples: One player stands still while the others try to sneak past them.
If the thief gets caught, they must leave the game.

practice_questions.q: What should the thief do to avoid being caught?
practice_questions.a: The thief should move when the guards are looking away!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Ital Run Game
content.concept: Running and teamwork in a fun relay.
content.explanation: In this game, players will run to collect balls from hoops and bring them back to their team. The first team to collect all the balls wins! рЯПГвАНвЩАпЄПрЯПЕ
examples: Each player takes turns running to the hoop.
Teams must work together to win.

practice_questions.q: How do you win the Ital Run?
practice_questions.a: By collecting all the balls before the other team!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Chakma Game
content.concept: Dodging and reaching the finish line.
content.explanation: In this game, one team tries to catch the other team while they run to a designated line. The runners must dodge to avoid being caught! рЯПГвАНвЩВпЄПрЯТ®
examples: Runners must think quickly to avoid being tagged.
Teams switch roles after each round.

practice_questions.q: What should you do to avoid being caught?
practice_questions.a: Dodge and run fast!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Learning about Vaccines
content.concept: Understanding the importance of vaccines.
content.explanation: Vaccines help protect us from getting sick. In this lesson, we will learn about different diseases and the vaccines that can help prevent them! рЯТЙрЯМЯ
examples: Discuss common vaccines like those for measles and polio.
Learn how vaccines work to keep us healthy.

practice_questions.q: Why are vaccines important?
practice_questions.a: They help prevent diseases and keep us healthy!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Why We Play
content.concept: Playing is a natural behavior that brings us together.
content.explanation: Playing games with friends, teachers, and family helps us bond and understand each other better. It teaches us teamwork and empathy! рЯ§Э
examples: Participating in a school sports day

practice_questions.q: Why is playing games important?
practice_questions.a: It helps us make friends and learn to work together.

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Our Local Games
content.concept: Different regions have unique games.
content.explanation: In our country, many games are played with different names in various regions. For example, 'Stovlaya' is known as 'Lagori' or 'Nargoloi' in some places! рЯОЙ

practice_questions.q: What is a game you know from your area?
practice_questions.a: Answers will vary based on the child's experience.

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: How to Play Stovlaya
content.concept: Understanding the rules of Stovlaya.
content.explanation: To play Stovlaya, you need seven flat stones and a soft ball. One team tries to knock down the stones while the other team tries to catch the ball! рЯПР

practice_questions.q: What do you need to play Stovlaya?
practice_questions.a: Seven flat stones and a soft ball.

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: How to Play Golap Togor
content.concept: Learning about Golap Togor.
content.explanation: In Golap Togor, teams learn about different subjects, fruits, and places while playing. It's a fun way to learn! рЯМЉ

practice_questions.q: What can you learn while playing Golap Togor?
practice_questions.a: You can learn about different subjects and fruits!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Introduction to Team Games
content.concept: Understanding team dynamics through games.
content.explanation: In team games, players work together to achieve a common goal. For example, in a game of catch, one player throws the ball while others try to catch it! рЯ§Ч

practice_questions.q: What is a team game?
practice_questions.a: A game where players work together.

practice_questions.q: Can you name a team game?
practice_questions.a: Yes! Like football or basketball!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Playing with Blindfolds
content.concept: Identifying players through touch and sound.
content.explanation: In this game, one player wears a blindfold and tries to guess who is touching them by feeling their back. It's all about using your other senses! рЯСАрЯ§Ђ
examples: Saying 'Please come, mango!' or 'Please come, brinjal!'

practice_questions.q: How do you identify someone in this game?
practice_questions.a: By feeling their back and guessing who they are.

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Catch Me If You Can!
content.concept: Understanding the rules of a running game.
content.explanation: One player is 'it' and tries to tag others while they run away. The game continues until everyone is caught! рЯПГвАНвЩВпЄПрЯПГвАНвЩАпЄП

practice_questions.q: What do you do when you are 'it'?
practice_questions.a: You try to tag the other players!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Playing Safely
content.concept: How to avoid injuries while playing.
content.explanation: Always be careful while playing! Make sure to stretch before games and watch where you're running to avoid bumps and falls! рЯЪІрЯ§Х

practice_questions.q: What should you do to stay safe while playing?
practice_questions.a: Stretch and be aware of your surroundings!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Rhyme about Playing
content.concept: Enjoying games with friends.
content.explanation: Let's have fun and play all day, with friends around, hip hip hooray! рЯОЙ

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Identifying Players
content.concept: Recognizing players in a game.
content.explanation: In this game, one player is blindfolded and tries to identify other players by their voices. If they guess correctly, they get a blindfold too! рЯО≠

practice_questions.q: How does it feel to play with friends?
practice_questions.a: It feels fun and exciting! рЯОЙ

practice_questions.q: What if you play alone?
practice_questions.a: It might feel lonely. рЯШҐ

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Jumping Over Ropes
content.concept: Jumping over obstacles to improve coordination.
content.explanation: In this game, players jump over a rope held by two others. If they succeed, they get to hold the rope next! рЯ™Ґ
examples: Increasing the height of the rope

practice_questions.q: How do you feel when you jump over the rope?
practice_questions.a: I feel like a superhero! рЯ¶ЄвАНвЩВпЄП

practice_questions.q: What happens if you can't jump over?
practice_questions.a: You can try again! Keep practicing! рЯТ™

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Playing Hopscotch
content.concept: Playing hopscotch to enhance balance.
content.explanation: Hopscotch is a fun game where you jump on numbered squares. You throw a stone and hop on one foot! рЯ™®
examples: Throwing a stone to land on a number

practice_questions.q: What do you do if you step on a line?
practice_questions.a: You have to start over! рЯЪґвАНвЩВпЄП

practice_questions.q: Who wins the game?
practice_questions.a: The first one to complete all squares! рЯПЖ

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Staying in the Circle
content.concept: Playing in a circle to develop strategy.
content.explanation: In this game, players stay inside a circle while trying to push others out. The last one standing wins! рЯФµ
examples: Players trying to push each other out

practice_questions.q: What strategy do you use to stay in the circle?
practice_questions.a: I keep my balance and watch others! рЯСА

practice_questions.q: How does it feel to win?
practice_questions.a: It feels amazing! рЯОЙ

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Overcoming Obstacles
content.concept: Building courage to face challenges.
content.explanation: This lesson helps you learn to overcome obstacles with courage and strength. You can use your feet to jump over them! рЯ¶µ

practice_questions.q: How do you feel when you jump over something?
practice_questions.a: I feel brave! рЯ¶Б

practice_questions.q: What do you say to encourage your friends?
practice_questions.a: You can do it! Go for it! рЯОК

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Understanding Size in Sports
content.concept: Shapes can be increased or decreased.
content.explanation: In sports, we can change the size of objects like balls or fields to make the game more fun! рЯОИ
examples: A big ball for younger kids рЯПР
A smaller ball for older kids вЪљ

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: How to Play Kumir
content.concept: Kumir is a fun game played in many regions.
content.explanation: In this game, one player is the 'Kumir' (crocodile) and tries to catch others who are hiding! рЯРК
examples: Players hide in safe zones рЯМ≥
Kumir can only catch players in water areas рЯМК

content.title: Rules of Kumir
content.concept: Understanding the rules of the game.

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Walking on the Flower Path
content.concept: A fun game with local calls.

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Rules of Flower Path
content.concept: Understanding how to play the Flower Path game.

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Playing Chakma Ball

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Chimchi Race

content.explanation: In this game, players balance a lemon on a spoon and race from the starting line to the finish line. The first one to reach the finish line without dropping the lemon wins! рЯПГвАНвЩВпЄПрЯНЛ

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Genda Maari
content.concept: A fun game using a soft ball.
content.explanation: In this game, one player tries to hit others with a soft ball while they run away. It's all about dodging and having fun! рЯПГвАНвЩАпЄПвЪљпЄП
examples: Player A throws the ball at Player B.
Player B tries to avoid getting hit.

practice_questions.q: What should you do to avoid getting hit?

content.subject: physical_education

Team B tries to hold their ground.

practice_questions.q: What should you do to stay safe while playing?

content.subject: physical_education

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Team Play

practice_questions.q: What happens when a player from the capturing team touches someone?
practice_questions.a: They switch teams!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Introduction to Yoga
content.concept: Yoga helps in maintaining a healthy body and mind.
content.explanation: Yoga is a great way to keep our bodies fit and our minds calm. рЯІШвАНвЩВпЄП It teaches us to be positive and take care of ourselves!

practice_questions.q: Why is yoga important?
practice_questions.a: It helps keep our body healthy and our mind peaceful!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Activities for Happiness
content.concept: Engaging in joyful activities keeps us happy.
content.explanation: We can do many fun things to stay happy like playing games, gardening, or singing! рЯОґ What activities make you happy?

practice_questions.q: What activities do you enjoy?
practice_questions.a: Playing games and singing!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Staying Healthy
content.concept: Healthy habits are essential for a good life.
content.explanation: To stay healthy, we need to eat nutritious food, exercise regularly, and maintain cleanliness. рЯНПрЯПГвАНвЩАпЄП Let's make healthy choices every day!

practice_questions.q: What can you do to stay healthy?
practice_questions.a: Eat healthy food and exercise!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Importance of Helping Others
content.concept: Helping others is a way to show kindness.
content.explanation: When we help others, we make our community better. For example, if you see an elderly person struggling with heavy bags, you can offer to help them. рЯШК
examples: Helping a friend with their homework

practice_questions.q: What do you feel when you help someone?
practice_questions.a: I feel happy and proud.

practice_questions.q: Why is it important to help elderly people?
practice_questions.a: They may need assistance and it shows respect.

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Introduction to Yoga
content.concept: Yoga helps us stay healthy and happy.
content.explanation: Yoga is a practice that includes different poses and breathing techniques. It helps us feel calm and strong. рЯІШвАНвЩВпЄП

practice_questions.q: What do you feel when you do yoga?
practice_questions.a: I feel relaxed and focused.

practice_questions.q: Can you name one yoga pose?
practice_questions.a: Yes, the Tree Pose!

content.subject: physical_education
content.title: Understanding Yamas

content.explanation: Yamas teach us how to behave with others. For example, being kind and not hurting anyone is a Yama called Ahimsa. рЯТЦ

practice_questions.q: What is Ahimsa?
